Frequently Asked Questions About Wedding Dresses
How much does a wedding dress typically cost?

Wedding dress prices can vary greatly depending on factors such as style, designer, and materials. At JJ's House, we understand the importance of accommodating different budgets. Our collection features a diverse range of options, including budget-friendly dresses starting at $500 and stunning options priced under $100. Explore our selection to find the perfect gown that suits both your style and budget.

What is the most popular wedding dress silhouette?

The A-line wedding dress silhouette remains a beloved favorite among brides for its universally flattering shape. Featuring a fitted bodice that cinches at the waist and gently flares out to the hem, the A-line style accentuates curves while providing comfort and grace. Renowned for its timeless appeal, the A-line silhouette offers brides a classic and elegant choice for their special day.

What type of undergarment should I wear with my wedding dress?

The choice of undergarments for your wedding dress depends on its style and design. Some dresses feature built-in support, while others may necessitate specific undergarments to achieve the desired shape and fit. For strapless dresses, a supportive bra that stays in place is often recommended. If your dress is made of thin or clingy fabric, seamless or no-show underwear can help prevent visible lines. Additionally, some brides opt for shapewear or corsets to provide extra support or create a specific silhouette. Consider the unique requirements of your dress and consult with a professional to ensure you find the perfect undergarments to enhance your wedding day look.

When is the best time to order my wedding dress?

To ensure a seamless wedding dress experience, it's recommended to order your dress 6-8 months before your wedding date. This timeframe allows for the creation, shipping, and necessary alterations closer to the big day. At JJ's House, we understand the urgency of rush orders. That's why we offer a range of standard size wedding dresses that can be shipped within 48 hours. Take advantage of our speedy options while ensuring your dream dress arrives on time for your special celebration. Plan ahead and order your wedding dress at the perfect time for a stress-free experience.

How do I find my wedding dress size?

As a general guideline, starting 2-4 sizes above your pant size is recommended when selecting a bridal gown. Keep in mind that wedding dresses can usually be altered 2-4 sizes down without compromising the dress's integrity. For example, a size 14 gown can be altered to fit a size 10 while maintaining its overall design.

Why are wedding dresses traditionally white, and can I choose a different color?

Traditionally, white has been associated with purity and innocence, which is why white wedding dresses became popular. However, modern brides have the freedom to choose a wedding dress in any color that reflects their personal style and preferences. From soft pastels to bold hues, the options are limitless. At JJ's House, we offer a wide range of wedding dresses in various colors, allowing you to express your individuality and make a statement on your special day. Whether you opt for a traditional white gown or decide to embrace a different color, we're here to help you find the perfect dress that makes you feel confident and beautiful.

What is your return and exchange policy for wedding dresses?

At JJ's House, we aim to provide a seamless return experience for our customers. You have the option to choose how you'd like to return your package:

1. Return Shipping Charges:
You can choose to return the package by yourself at your cost. The price may vary depending on your country and the shipping company you choose. Additionally, you are responsible for confirming the return delivery status.
For customers from specific countries, we offer return labels for a more convenient return experience. While we do charge a return shipping fee, utilizing our return label typically results in lower costs compared to other shipping companies. With our return label, you won't need to worry about arranging return delivery.

2. Return Label Service:
For customers from countries with return label service, we provide return labels that you can directly attach to the front of your package. The return shipping fees will be automatically deducted from your refund amount. Please refer to our website for a list of countries eligible for return label service and their respective return shipping fee standards.

3. Without Return Label Service:
If you're from a country without return label service, you can still return the items by taking your package to the local post location and sending it back to us. In this case, the return shipping fee will be paid by you directly to the post location.

Exchanges
We do not offer an exchange service for any products at this time. Many of our items are made-to-order, so we don't keep these items in stock. If an item doesn't work out and another one is needed, a return will need to be processed for all unwanted items (if eligible per the return policy) and a new order must be placed for new items.

We strive to ensure that our return process is as convenient and transparent as possible for our valued customers. If you have any questions or require further assistance regarding returns, please don't hesitate to contact our customer service team or refer to our returns & refunds page for more information.

Do you offer try-on services for wedding dresses?

To enhance your shopping experience, we offer try-on services for wedding dresses in selected countries. (US, UK, DE, FR, AU, BE, AT, and CA).

Try-on services allow customers in these countries to try on their desired wedding dress before making a final decision. Please note that availability and terms may vary where you can find more information from our try-on services guide.

We apologize for any inconvenience to customers outside of these eligible countries. However, we remain committed to providing exceptional service and are actively exploring options to expand our try-on services in the future.
